# Trigonometry for location finding

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry for location finding: In geography and navigation, trigonometry is most frequently used to identify the latitude and longitude of a specified position. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
